# One banned word per line (case-insensitive). Comments and blank lines
# are ignored. Used by /autonovel:evaluate and /autonovel:check-anachronism.
#
# This default is seeded for historical / alt-historical / period-fantasy
# series set in 1400-1600 Europe. Remove anything that does not apply to
# your series, add your own. The list is conservative: it targets
# vocabulary the writer is most likely to reach for under time pressure,
# not every last anachronism a period scholar would catch.

# --- Modern conversational register ---------------------------------
okay
ok
yeah
yep
yup
hey
cool
awesome
weird
creepy
crazy
amazing
massive
huge
tiny
tons
lots

# --- Modern qualifiers / hedges -------------------------------------
definitely
obviously
basically
literally
actually
seriously
totally
honestly
probably
kinda
sorta

# --- 19th-20th century technology / metaphors -----------------------
radar
laser
camera
photograph
photo
snapshot
film
video
telephone
phone
telegram
telegraph
email
text
app
computer
internet
online
offline
website
download
upload
scan
click
screen
keyboard
monitor
battery
electric
electrical
electricity
motor
engine
automobile
car
truck
train
railway
airplane
airport
radio
television
broadcast

# --- Modern institutional / social concepts -------------------------
teenager
teenagers
weekend
vacation
holiday
tourist
tourism
schedule
appointment
timeline
deadline
meeting
interview
therapy
therapist
trauma
stressed
stressful
depression
anxiety
boyfriend
girlfriend
partner
relationship

# --- Forensics / detection (post-1800) -----------------------------
fingerprint
fingerprints
DNA
evidence-based
profiling
surveillance
database

# --- 20th-century idioms + managerial register --------------------
awesome
zero
twenty-four-seven
24/7
game-changer
game-changing
proactive
reactive
feedback
workflow
bandwidth
leverage
scalable
robust
seamless
